Our Yankee Doodles program runs half day, three days a week and is packed with energized team activities for busy minds as well as focus time for independent creative projects. Children will be introduced to foundational skills in reading, writing and art. This program includes course material from a combination of curriculums including Tuttle Twins, Dimensions Math and Hillsdale College's 1776 History for Pre K and Kindergarten. Your little ones will find this program entertaining and parents will appreciate the wide range of knowledge and skills their children quickly acquire. Extend half days to full days by adding two electives each day.
